steps.title: Intambwe ya mbere: Intego na Ihram
steps.details:
• Umugambi wo gukora Umra, winjire muri Ihram i Miqat, hanyuma utangire Talbiyah.
  • Yakurikije amategeko Ihram, kandi yarangije umuhango wo kwisukura mbere yo gutangira umuhango.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:196 n'umwaka wo gutangira imihango kuva kuri Miqat.

steps.title: Intambwe ya Kabiri: Kwinjira muri Al-Masjid Al-Haram
steps.details:
• Injira bucece, usenga kandi wicisha bugufi.
  • Tangirira ku ruhande rufasha abantu kugenda mu mutekano, hanyuma werekeze mu gace ka Tawaf.
steps.evidence: Amabwiriza rusange y'ubuhanuzi ku myitwarire myiza mu misigiti no koroshya ugusenga.

steps.title: Intambwe ya gatatu: Tawaf (imihanda irindwi)
steps.details:
• Kora Tawaf uzenguruka Kaabah inshuro zirindwi, uhereye ku murongo Black Stone.
  • Komeza kwibuka Imana kandi wirinde kugirira nabi abandi mu rugendo rw'abantu benshi.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Apple Watch kugira ngo igufashe kubara imiyoboro yawe Tawaf.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Wear OS iri ku isaha yawe kugira ngo igufashe kubara imiyoboro yawe Tawaf.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:29 n'ibisobanuro byanditswe by'uko Intumwa yazengurutse.
steps.referenceLabel: Amabwiriza y'urugendo rwa Umrah muri Nosuk

steps.title: Intambwe ya kane: Isengesho nyuma ya Tawaf
steps.details: • Dusenge raka ebyiri nyuma yo kurangiza Tawaf niba bishoboka tudateye ikibazo abantu, hanyuma dukomeze kunywa amazi Zamzam mu buryo buteguye.
steps.evidence: Umugenzo uzwi cyane muri Hadithi z'ukuri ku bijyanye n'isengesho nyuma ya Tawaf.

steps.title: Intambwe ya gatanu: Saie hagati ya Safa na Marwah
steps.details:
• Gira Saie mu mizunguruko irindwi hagati ya Safa na Marwah, uhereye kuri Safa ukagera kuri Marwah, usenga kandi wibuka.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Apple Watch kugira ngo igufashe kubara amanota Saie yatsinze.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Wear OS iri ku isaha yawe kugira ngo igufashe kubara uko Saie yarushagaho gukora.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:158 n'inkuru z'ukuri hakurikijwe gahunda y'intumwa.
steps.referenceLabel: Amabwiriza y'urugendo rwa Umrah muri Nosuk

steps.title: Intambwe ya gatandatu: Kogosha umusatsi cyangwa kogosha
steps.details:
• Abagabo bogosha cyangwa bakagabanya umusatsi wabo, naho abagore bakawugabanyaho igice gito.
  • Kandi ibi ni byo bituma Umrah irangira na Ihram irangira.
steps.evidence: Quran 48:27 n'inkuru z'ukuri zijyanye no kogosha no kugabanya.

steps.title: Intambwe ya mbere: Ihram n'umugambi wa Hijja
steps.details:
• Injira muri ihram muri Miqat, teganya ubwoko bwa Hija yawe, hanyuma ukomeze Talbiyah.
  • Komeza gukurikiza amategeko Ihram kugeza ugeze aho Ihram isohoka.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:196 n'imihango y'ubuhanuzi yemeranyijweho yo gutangira Hija.

steps.title: Intambwe ya kabiri: Yawm at-Tarwiyah muri Mina
steps.details: • Ku itariki ya munani ya Dhul Hijjah, ujye i Mina, usenge Imana ku bihe byagenwe, kandi witegure mu buryo bw'umwuka no mu buryo bw'ibikoresho kwizihiza Arafah.

steps.title: Intambwe ya gatatu: Guhagarara kuri Arafah
steps.details:
• Mumare umunsi wa cyenda wa Dhul Hijjah muri Arafah musenga, mwibuka Imana kandi mwicuza.
  • Iyi ni yo nkingi y'ingenzi ya Hija.
steps.referenceLabel: Amabwiriza ya Minisiteri y'Ubuhanzi bwa Hija

steps.title: Intambwe ya kane: Muzdalifah no gukusanya amabuye
steps.details: • Nyuma y'izuba rirenze, jya i Muzdalifah, usenge Maghrib na Isha, urareyo, hanyuma utore amabuye yo gutera Mina.
steps.evidence: Urukurikirane rw'ubuhanuzi nyuma ya Arafah mu nkuru z'ukuri.

steps.title: Intambwe ya Gatanu: Rami, igitambo, n'ubusizi
steps.details: • Ku munsi wa Eid, iyo urimo gutera ibuye rya Jamarat al-Aqabah, tanga igitambo aho bibaye ngombwa, hanyuma wogoshe cyangwa wogoshe umusatsi wawe kugira ngo uhitemo tahlil ya mbere.
steps.referenceLabel: Amabwiriza ya Minisiteri y'Ubuhanzi bwa Hija

steps.title: Intambwe ya gatandatu: Tawaf al-Ifadah (ibice birindwi)
steps.details:
• Garuka i Maka ukorere Tawaf al-Ifadah, urangize inzira zirindwi, kandi ukomeze kugenda mu mutekano no mu buryo butekanye mu bihe by'akazi kenshi.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Apple Watch kugira ngo igufashe kubara imiyoboro yawe Tawaf.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Wear OS iri ku isaha yawe kugira ngo igufashe kubara imiyoboro yawe Tawaf.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:29 n'ibisobanuro byanditswe ku byerekeye kuzenguruka kw'itegeko.

steps.title: Intambwe ya 7: Bwira umuntu ukenewe
steps.details:
• Kora Saie igihe ubwoko bwa Hija yawe bubigusaba, ariko ugakomeza uruhererekane n'umubare w'ingendo zirindwi hagati ya Safa na Marwah.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Apple Watch kugira ngo igufashe kubara amanota Saie yatsinze.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Wear OS iri ku isaha yawe kugira ngo igufashe kubara uko Saie yarushagaho gukora.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:158 n'ishyirwa mu bikorwa ryayo mu mategeko mu mihango ya Hija.
steps.referenceLabel: Amabwiriza ya Minisiteri y'Ubuhanzi bwa Hija

steps.title: Intambwe ya 8: Ayyam at-Tashriq na Tawaf al-Wada'
steps.details:
• Guguma i Mina mu gihe cya Tashreeq kugira ngo ukore imihango yo gutera Jamarat, hanyuma ugakora Tawaf al-Wada' mbere yo kuva i Makka, keretse abadafite icyo bakora.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Apple Watch kugira ngo igufashe kubara imiyoboro yawe Tawaf.
  • Inama: Koresha porogaramu Wear OS iri ku isaha yawe kugira ngo igufashe kubara imiyoboro yawe Tawaf.
steps.evidence: Imihango yashyizweho ishingiye ku buyobozi Quran no ku ishyirwa mu bikorwa ry’ukuri rya Sunnah y’ubuhanuzi.
